result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a .msi from a provided .exe installer.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.ExeToMsi [options]

Options:
  --debug                                     Indicates the tool should write out debug logging. [default: False]
  --exe-file-path <exe-file-path> (REQUIRED)  File path to the executable.
  --exe-arguments <exe-arguments>             Arguments to call during the exe run.
  --msi-name <msi-name> (REQUIRED)            Name of the msi file. Also the name of the installed app in windows.
  --msi-version <msi-version> (REQUIRED)      Version of the .msi. Should be format 'A.B.C.D'.
  --version                                   Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information
